positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a mountain landscape at dawn. The composition features sharply defined, layered geometric peaks rising from a calm, stylized valley. The color palette is highly restricted to deep navy, burnt orange, and muted sage green, creating strong color blocking and high contrast. Use a woodcut etching style combined with graphic vector art aesthetics. The sun is a crisp, bright circle casting hard shadows. The central focus must be the sharp, clean silhouettes of the peaks. Suitable for apparel screen printing, clean edges, solid colors, negative space utilization. High resolution, pop art poster aesthetic, vector graphic, detailed linework, symmetrical composition.
